story: In 1288, a baby prince was born in Japan who would grow up to change history. This little boy became Emperor Go-Daigo. As an adult, he bravely fought against powerful rulers called shoguns. On November 26, years later, Go-Daigo successfully overthrew the Kamakura shogunate. He brought back direct imperial rule in a time known as the Kenmu Restoration.
activity_question: What did Emperor Go-Daigo successfully overthrow?
follow_up_question: What was the name given to the period when Go-Daigo restored imperial rule?

title: A Legendary Gunslinger's Surprising Start
story: Bang! The Wild West had its share of famous gunslingers, but did you know one of the most famous wasn't even American? Bat Masterson, born in 1853 on November 26, came into the world in Henriville, Canada East. This future legend of the American frontier would grow up to become a renowned gunfighter, lawman, and larger-than-life figure of the Old West.
activity_question: Where was Bat Masterson born?
follow_up_question: Can you think of other jobs Bat Masterson might have had in the Wild West besides being a gunfighter?

title: Fast Food Pioneer Flips His First Burger
story: Sizzling grills and golden arches! Maurice 'Mac' McDonald, born in Manchester, New Hampshire on November 26, 1902, would grow up to revolutionize fast food. With his brother, Mac co-founded McDonald's, the restaurant chain that became a global icon. Their speedy service system changed how people eat on the go.
activity_question: What did Maurice 'Mac' McDonald co-found?
bonus_fact: The first McDonald's menu had only nine items, including hamburgers for just 15 cents!

title: Fantasy Author Begins His Own Adventure
story: Tracy Hickman's journey into fantasy worlds began when he was born in Salt Lake City, Utah in 1955. On November 26 that year, a future master of dragons and magical realms entered our world. Hickman would grow up to become a beloved American sci-fi author, penning tales that transport readers to extraordinary places filled with mythical creatures and epic quests.
activity_question: Where was Tracy Hickman born?
bonus_fact: Tracy Hickman co-wrote the popular Dragonlance series, which has sold millions of copies worldwide.
